description: Pinned HEAD SHAs of the repos used to auto-generate evals/context_retrieval_queries.jsonl. Queries are built from the first docstring sentence of each function/class with a docstring (>=4 informative tokens after stripping identifier-name tokens). Ground truth = identifier + relative file path.
notes: The original n=10 hand-built ground-truth queries from Stages 5-8 (httpx/jinja2) are retained as a labeled continuity subset in results/bm25_retrieval_baseline.md. The auto-generated set includes test functions; each query derives from that exact function's own docstring, so ground truth is unambiguous.
